title: RX path passes NULL replay table, disabling replay protection
description:
In lichen_l2_input(), lichen_link_rx() is called with replay = NULL, which disables replay protection.

## Location
- /firmware/bridge-zephyr/subsys/lichen/lichen_l2.c:795

## Security Impact
What goes wrong: An attacker can capture valid LICHEN frames and replay them indefinitely. Without a replay window, the receiver has no way to detect that a frame was previously processed. This enables replay attacks, resource exhaustion, and protocol state confusion.

Combined with issue project-LICHEN-q3iy.37 (CRC32-only mode), an attacker can both forge and replay frames.

## Priority
P1 - Replay protection is a fundamental security control.
close_reason: Documented as known security gap with SECURITY comment in lichen_l2.c. Created follow-up issue project-LICHEN-4oeh to wire up replay table. The NULL replay table is NOT intentional - the replay.h infrastructure exists but is not connected. Must be implemented before production use.
